content: Animation Graph Editor - You can now click on pins to drag them instead of having to hold down
`Class.GroundController.AccelerationTime` and `Class.GroundController.DecelerationTime` now only affect linear acceleration, not turning acceleration.

`Class.UserInputService:GetStringForKeyCode()` now accepts an optional second parameter of `Enum.KeyCodeStringFormat` (`Enum.KeyCodeStringFormat|Default` or `Enum.KeyCodeStringFormat|Abbreviated`). For example, "Left Control", "Right Control", and "Left Alt" become "LCtrl", "RCtrl", and "LAlt" respectively. Keys without a defined abbreviation fall through to the existing behavior.

Adds `Class.AudioEmitter.PositionType`, `Class.AudioEmitter.PositionInstance`, `Class.AudioListener.PositionType`, and `Class.AudioListener.PositionInstance` for setting the position of `Class.AudioEmitter|AudioEmitters` and `Class.AudioListener|AudioListeners` independent of their parent `Class.Instance`.
Adds `Class.DataModel.ServerRestartScheduled` event.
Updates the `Class.Workspace.PlayerScriptsUseInputActionSystem` default `Class.PlayerScripts` to use the `Class.Player:GetCameraState()` API.
In the New Luau Type Solver, fixes an issue where variadic function arguments were not pushed into lambdas.
Converts the `Class.Workspace.PlayerScriptsUseInputActionSystem` default `Class.PlayerScripts` to fire `Class.InputBinding|InputBindings` of type `Enum.InputBindingType|Scriptable`.
Reduces the mix-time of `Class.AudioEmitter`/`Class.AudioListener` by 15-30%.
Fixes a case where Script Analysis would report spurious warnings for certain generic functions in strict mode.
Adds support for read-only table indexers to the type function runtime.
Fixes Studio script editor freeze when pasting large scripts.
Studio's "Group as Model" context action now changes into "Group as Frame" when only GUI objects are selected.
In the Animation Graph Editor, editing the name of a node will now select all the text box contents.
Fixes rendering of transparent avatars with highlights.
In the Animation Graph Editor, the color of curves now fade alongside the weight.
Fixes nodes in the Animation Graph Editor not providing the clip name in their title.
Set a limit to the growth factor of deferred operations queued within any given resumption point.
Adds mouse support to iPadOS.
Make Z-near plane more consistent across all platforms.
In the New Luau Type Solver, fixes an issue with crashing when assigning to locals annotated with `typeof()` types.
Clarifies the error shown when `Class.Humanoid:ApplyDescription()` is called from the wrong context on a server-created `Class.Humanoid`.
Fixes Magic Mouse scrolling in Roblox Studio.
Fixes Magic Mouse scrolling in Roblox Studio.
Potential fix for the `Class.Instance`-picker sometimes selecting things behind the intended part when modifying an `Class.Instance`-reference property.
